name: Fire Equipment Identification Sign
shortDescription: Overhead location markers for extinguishers, hydrants and call points.
longDescription: Equipment identification signage makes fire appliances findable from a distance and across a crowded shop floor. Typically mounted above the appliance at height so it stays visible over racking and machinery. Available as flat, projecting or double-sided panels.

images.alt: Fire Equipment Identification Sign supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara

specs.label: Pictograms
specs.value: Extinguisher, hydrant, hose reel, call point
